text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is on today, right? I really want to
see that powerful running of hers!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? She really is a beast! Ahhh, I'm so
glad to be alive right now to witness her!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
But it seems like Mayano Top Gun is running as
well! I hear people are expecting big things from
her!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
I think being able to come to this Arima Kinen is
the proudest moment of my life!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. The crowd appears quite animated this
year.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is it in anticipation of the champion's triumphant
return? Or perhaps the appearance of a rising
hero that would defeat her?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have high hopes for you, Narita Brian. And that
strength of yours.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
"Is this tide of change unstoppable?"
"Who will face Brian, the strongest racer?"

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This year's not even over. Even if they claim I'm
the strongest, it doesn't mean anything.
choice_data_list:
Still, I completely understand wanting to call
you that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Well, if that's the case, just remember you're the
one who made me the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Time to conquer once more and take the final
crown of the Senior Autumn Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Expect nothing short of victory from me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...You're here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, I managed to pull it off in time and run
in the Arima Kinen with you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Allow me to officially challenge you, and—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna be the one to beat Brian!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Krrrsh! Do you copy?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heh. This is Mayano Top Gun, the winner of this
year's Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She's still young, but if you underestimate her,
she'll knock you off your feet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh... I see.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well then, both of you listen up!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Come at me like you mean it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Of course!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! ☆
